title: xz decompression in pkg/machine bugs
body:
- Errors are silently discarded in https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/f756e5db68d122c0222098732c55d47fe30bbadb/pkg/machine/compression/decompress.go#L140 : https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21592#discussion_r1486564267
- https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/f756e5db68d122c0222098732c55d47fe30bbadb/pkg/machine/compression/decompress.go#L151 can return before all data is copied: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21592#discussion_r1486564761 (And it’s unclear to me why there is a goroutine involved at all, `cmd.Start()` is ~non-blocking.)
